scope: Yukawa-sensitive thermal observables; outer baseline via Track 1; inner residual structure characterized via inner-factor Mellin engine theorems

backbone_theorems.name: eta_trivialization
backbone_theorems.statement: Tr(D_F^k * exp(-t*D_F^2)) = 0 for all odd k on any Krajewski-class even finite spectral triple

backbone_theorems.name: AC_factorization
backbone_theorems.statement: D^2 = D_GV^2 (x) 1 + 1 (x) D_F^2; Tr(exp(-t*D^2)) = Tr(exp(-t*D_GV^2)) * Tr(exp(-t*D_F^2))
backbone_theorems.mechanism: cross-term {D_GV (x) 1, gamma_GV (x) D_F} = 0 by outer chirality

catalogue.name: lepton_thermal_free_energy

inner_residual.structure: linear in sum of Yukawa squares; pure k=2 Mellin trace at integer s

T_F_constraint.what_must_match: Tr(D_F^2) reproduces SM sum m_e^2 + m_mu^2 + m_tau^2 + 3*(quark masses) at v=246 GeV
T_F_constraint.uniqueness: completely fixed by SM Yukawas; no generation-multiplicity ambiguity

catalogue.falsifier: any T_F whose Tr(D_F^2) does not reproduce the known SM mass-squared sum

catalogue.name: QCD_thermal_pressure_g_QCD

outer_baseline.value: p/T^4 = (pi^2/45) * g_QCD; per-mode coefficient -(7/720)*pi^2*T^4 (fermions) or -(pi^2/90)*T^4 (bosons), each from Track 1

inner_residual.key_invariant: color factor 3 = ratio of color-triplet to color-singlet sectors in T_F
inner_residual.Connes_value: dim H_F = 32 (one generation); 6:2 = 3:1 multiplicity ratio (Leg 4 of inner-factor Mellin memo)

T_F_constraint.uniqueness: requires M_3(C) summand in A_F; M_2 . M_3 with wrong multiplicity assignment ruled out

catalogue.falsifier: T_F without M_3(C) summand, or with wrong color multiplicity, fails to reproduce g_QCD = 47.5
catalogue.note: tests algebra structure of T_F (color factor) rather than parameter values

catalogue.name: Higgs_effective_potential_finite_T

outer_baseline.value: Stefan-Boltzmann backbone from Track 1; phi-dependent fermion mass operator NOT in framework
outer_baseline.source: Track 1 partial; off-diagonal D_F block lives entirely inside T_F
outer_baseline.Sprint_H1_constraint: framework admits Higgs structurally iff Y>0; does not select Y

inner_residual.structure: trace of off-diagonal D_F block squared; pure k=2
inner_residual.higher_order: two-loop m_T^2 * log(m_T^2) corrections probe Yukawa product structure

T_F_constraint.what_must_match: off-diagonal D_F block whose squared diagonal entries are SM Yukawa squared values
T_F_constraint.uniqueness: CC standard A_F = C + H + M_3(C) is canonical but not unique

catalogue.falsifier: T_F with zero off-diagonal block (Marcolli-vS-without-Higgs limit) predicts NO high-T symmetry restoration; empirically falsified by sphaleron transition at T_C ~ 160 GeV
catalogue.note: structurally Higgs-sector specific; cleanest probe of off-diagonal CC block

catalogue.name: EW_thermal_Debye_masses

outer_baseline.value: 1-loop vacuum polarization graph from Track 1 + gauge couplings external
outer_baseline.source: Papers 25/30 Wilson construction + Track 1; coupling magnitudes are external

inner_residual.structure: (2 + N_gen) * g^2; bilinear in gauge coupling, linear in N_gen
inner_residual.key_invariant: generation multiplicity N_gen = 3 from inner factor copies
inner_residual.factor_origin: doublet contributions (gauge bosons themselves) plus matter contributions per generation

T_F_constraint.what_must_match: N_gen = 3 generation copies, each containing SU(2)_L doublet structure
T_F_constraint.uniqueness: CC's A_F with standard SU(2) embedding in H passes; N_gen=1 or N_gen=4 would be measurably different

catalogue.falsifier: T_F with wrong N_gen would predict different m_D^2; lattice or early-universe constraints sample (2+N_gen) factor
catalogue.note: less clean than 2.3 because gauge couplings external; residual factors through both Yukawas and gauge couplings

catalogue.name: thermal_alpha_running

outer_baseline.value: 1-loop QED VP on S^3 from Paper 28 Sprint Q-1: Pi = 1/(48*pi^2), beta(alpha) = 2*alpha^2/(3*pi)

inner_residual.structure: Tr_inner(Q_F^2 * log(T/M_F)); NOT pure power Mellin trace because of logarithm
inner_residual.coefficient: sum_f Q_f^2 * N_c(f) = 8/3 per generation (Phase 4H Track SM-B)

T_F_constraint.what_must_match: charge assignment Q_F encoded in A_F representation theory; color factor N_c from M_3(C); generation multiplicity from copies
T_F_constraint.uniqueness: charge assignment forced by gauge anomaly cancellation in SM

catalogue.falsifier: T_F violating per-generation sum 8/3 fails precision Delta_alpha(T)/alpha datasets
catalogue.eta_trivialization_filter: PASS_at_thermal_correction; bare logarithmic running involves k=1 piece (eta invariant) which trivializes
catalogue.note: logarithmic dependence makes residual non-Mellin; precision hard to extract; structurally outside the master Mellin engine for finite parts

filtered_out_by_eta_trivialization.name: axial_chemical_potential_thermodynamics
filtered_out_by_eta_trivialization.reason: depends on Tr(gamma_F * D_F * exp(-t*D_F^2)) k=1 trace, identically zero on any Krajewski triple
filtered_out_by_eta_trivialization.structural_prediction: no axial chemical potential thermodynamics from inner factor in CC-compatible SM extension

filtered_out_by_eta_trivialization.name: parity_odd_transport_chiral_magnetic
filtered_out_by_eta_trivialization.reason: k=1 trivializes at single-fermion level; CME and similar arise from anomaly inflow not factoring through inner Mellin

filtered_out_by_eta_trivialization.name: electric_dipole_moments_finite_T
filtered_out_by_eta_trivialization.reason: parity-odd time-reversal-odd; k=1 at inner factor

honest_scope: no T_F is selected; catalogue entries are consistency checks on candidates
outer baselines are textbook QFT; framework does not derive them; new content is factor placement
logarithmic running (2.5) does not factor cleanly into Mellin engine; LS-8a wall
generation count is not predicted; appears as empirical multiplicity factor in T_F
outer baseline of 2.3 is weakest; framework does not produce phi-dependent fermion mass operator

paper_updates_drafted_not_applied.change: append paragraph on thermal probes of Yukawa Dirichlet ring (~30 lines)
append thermal extension of H1 verdict; Marcolli-vS-without-Higgs falsified by sphaleron transition data

discipline_check.selection_bias_controls: framework provides catalogue, not predictions; W3 falsification discipline preserved
